style_name: Halftone Assemblage Metaphor PSA Poster Style
style_summary: A sparse retro PSA poster system where one visible class of material is arranged into a different recognizable symbolic silhouette, printed as a muted blue-green halftone object on aged cream paper with compact red-and-navy campaign typography.

environment_variables.SUBJECT: main subject
environment_variables.STYLE_FIDELITY_ANCHORS: observable style traits that must remain visible
environment_variables.SOURCE_CONTENT_TO_AVOID: literal source content that generated samples must not recreate

style_fidelity_anchors: The central idea is material-as-symbol: one category of visible source objects must be assembled into a different readable target silhouette.
The target silhouette must read clearly from a distance before the viewer notices the individual source pieces.
The source material must remain legible up close through repeated parts, seams, caps, folds, cables, rims, labels, or textures.
Aged warm cream paper background with visible grain and faint uneven printing.
One dominant blue-green halftone assemblage object, placed as a sculptural PSA metaphor rather than a realistic scene.
Large quiet negative space, with the assembled silhouette occupying the lower-middle field.
Compact top-left uppercase headline in heavy condensed sans lettering.
Two-color type hierarchy: deep navy for most words and saturated red for one or two emotional emphasis words.
Tiny bottom-center footer line plus a small row of simplified geometric symbols.
Soft pseudo-3D volume built from halftone highlights, object contours, dot screen, and low-contrast shadows.
Retro offset-print finish with halftone dots, registration softness, faded ink density, and muted palette.
Minimal background detail; the poster works as a clever symbolic object study.
source_content_to_avoid: Do not recreate plastic bottles, bottle caps, or clear bottle ribbing as the source material.
Do not recreate a dog, pet, pet-friendly premise, or the original animal silhouette.
Do not use the original headline, footer slogan, recycle-icon cluster, or any closely paraphrased text.
Do not use the same diagonal bottle-body assembly, cap pile, loose cap detail, or two-tall-bottles-on-right composition.
Do not let the source material become a random pile, tower, product stack, or abstract sculpture without a clearly readable target silhouette.
Do not include brand logos, watermarks, signatures, QR codes, platform marks, or creator IDs.

visual_deconstruction.style_category: retro environmental PSA poster using symbolic object assemblage
visual_deconstruction.semantic_mechanism: The image creates meaning by using one material class to imitate another recognizable object or living form, producing a visual metaphor.
visual_deconstruction.layout: portrait-led poster grammar with generous empty cream space, top-left headline, large lower-middle assemblage silhouette, and tiny footer lockup
visual_deconstruction.subject_treatment: everyday objects remain individually visible while collectively forming a different silhouette, rendered in blue-green halftone ink
visual_deconstruction.perspective: front-facing object study with slight low-angle monumentality and gentle grounding shadow
visual_deconstruction.typography: bold uppercase condensed sans, tight word blocks, alternating navy and red emphasis
visual_deconstruction.texture: aged paper grain, coarse halftone, uneven ink coverage, and soft offset registration
visual_deconstruction.mood: public-service warning with clever symbolic wit and restrained retro charm

composition.primary_layout: Keep one large material-built silhouette as the visual hero, placed low-middle or slightly right of center with a clear top-left headline zone.
composition.metaphor_rule: The silhouette must be a new target form, while the visible pieces must come from a different source material category.
composition.negative_space: Reserve roughly half the image as warm paper field, especially above and around the assembled silhouette.
composition.footer: Place tiny supporting copy and simple symbols near the bottom center, far smaller than the headline.
composition.depth: Use shallow poster depth: volume is suggested by halftone highlights and soft contact shadow rather than realistic scene perspective.

typography.headline: Heavy condensed uppercase sans lettering, compact line breaks, minimal tracking, and slightly imperfect print edges.
typography.color_behavior: Use navy for the base statement and red for one or two emphasis words.
typography.placement: Main text sits in the open upper-left field, not on top of the assemblage.
typography.microcopy: Footer type is tiny, centered, and treated like an old campaign imprint.

color_palette.palette_rule: Keep the image near a three-ink print system: cream ground, blue-green assemblage, navy/red type.

image_treatment.rendering: Blue-green monochrome halftone assemblage illustration where individual source objects remain visible inside a readable target silhouette.
image_treatment.lighting: Flat ambient poster light with soft internal highlights and minimal cast shadow.
image_treatment.print_finish: Coarse paper grain, visible dot pattern, faded ink, and soft registration blur.
image_treatment.detail_level: Enough detail to read the source pieces, but sparse surroundings and a clean overall silhouette.

design_rules: Each image must answer: what material is being used, and what different silhouette is it forming?
The assembled target silhouette must be readable from across the room.
The source pieces must stay identifiable when viewed up close.
Keep the object large enough to feel like a poster monument but leave strong negative space.
Use only a small amount of text: one short headline, one tiny footer line, and a minimal symbol row.
Preserve the blue-green halftone assemblage treatment on every case.
Let red type act as the main emotional accent while navy carries the rest of the message.
Keep all icons or symbols abstract and generic, never brand-like.
do: Use visible source materials arranged into a different symbolic silhouette.
Use aged cream paper, muted blue-green halftone objects, navy type, and red emphasis.
Use concise uppercase PSA copy with compact line breaks.
Use a soft teal grounding shadow and minimal environmental detail.
Make the metaphor immediate: material first up close, silhouette first from far away.
avoid: Avoid random piles, generic towers, or abstract stacks that do not form a recognizable silhouette.
Avoid plastic bottles, bottle caps, dog silhouettes, pet copy, and recycle-logo repetition.
Avoid photoreal product photography, glossy 3D render polish, dense collage, or cinematic lighting.
Avoid modern app UI, QR codes, watermarks, brand marks, price tags, and social platform artifacts.
Avoid long paragraphs, many labels, or text placed over the main assemblage.
negative_prompt: random pile, generic stack, abstract tower, unclear silhouette, plastic bottles, bottle caps, dog silhouette, pet-friendly text, original slogan, recycle-icon cluster, exact source layout, logos, watermarks, QR codes, platform UI, glossy photorealism, modern vector poster, dense scene, rainbow colors, cinematic lighting, long body copy

values.SUBJECT: old headphones, cracked phone shells, charger bricks, adapter blocks, and coiled cables arranged to form a recognizable small bird silhouette
values.SUBJECT_ACTION: the e-waste parts collectively read as a perched warning bird, while each electronic piece remains visible up close
values.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: tangled audio cable loops for the wings, phone-shell fragments for the body, charger blocks for the feet, and a tiny screw as the eye
values.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: faint paper speckles, soft teal contact shadow, and a tiny abstract symbol row at the bottom
values.WARDROBE_STYLE: not applicable; object-only material assemblage poster
values.STYLE_FIDELITY_ANCHORS: material-as-silhouette metaphor, readable bird silhouette made from e-waste, aged cream paper, blue-green halftone object, navy and red condensed type, sparse PSA layout, tiny footer symbols
values.SOURCE_CONTENT_TO_AVOID: no plastic bottles, no bottle caps, no dog or pet silhouette, no original slogan, no recycle icon cluster

values.SUBJECT: used paper coffee cups, cup sleeves, stirrers, lids, and bent straws arranged to form a clear fish silhouette
values.SUBJECT_ACTION: the disposable drink pieces collectively become a fish shape, suggesting waste returning to water
values.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: stacked cup rims for scales, cup sleeves for the body, straw curves for fins, and a small lid opening as the eye
values.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: warm paper grain, faint offset ink mottling, soft teal floor shadow, tiny bottom-center campaign imprint
values.ACCENT_SYMBOL: two small plus marks and a square dot
values.WARDROBE_STYLE: not applicable; object-only material assemblage poster
values.STYLE_FIDELITY_ANCHORS: clear target silhouette from a different source material, blue-green halftone fish made from coffee waste, upper-left block headline, red emphasis word, empty cream field, tiny footer line
values.SOURCE_CONTENT_TO_AVOID: no plastic bottle shapes, no caps, no dog or pet pose, no copied text, no recycle symbols

values.SUBJECT: paper seed packets, gardening gloves, twine, small clay pot fragments, and plant tags arranged to form a simple tree silhouette
values.SUBJECT_ACTION: the gardening materials collectively read as a young tree with trunk and canopy
values.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: folded seed envelopes as leaves, glove fingers as branches, twine as trunk lines, clay fragments as roots, and tiny soil crumbs near the base
values.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: aged cream paper, almost empty backdrop, tiny bottom symbols that resemble abstract leaves without logos
values.WARDROBE_STYLE: not applicable; object-only material assemblage poster
values.STYLE_FIDELITY_ANCHORS: readable tree silhouette built from gardening objects, muted cream and blue-green ink system, halftone dot shading, compact red and navy headline, low-detail background, poster-grain finish
values.SOURCE_CONTENT_TO_AVOID: no bottles, no bottle caps, no dog or pet silhouette, no original footer slogan, no recycling-logo repetition

values.SUBJECT: bicycle spokes, brake cables, folded transit tickets, a handlebar grip, and a small bell arranged to form a large feather silhouette
values.SUBJECT_ACTION: the commute parts collectively read as a light feather, symbolizing lower-impact movement
values.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: thin wheel spokes as feather barbs, brake cable as the center shaft, folded tickets as layered vanes, and a bell near the base
values.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: paper grain, faded ink density, soft teal base shadow, small bottom-center row of transit-like abstract marks
values.SECONDARY_TEXT: one trip can change the air
values.WARDROBE_STYLE: not applicable; object-only material assemblage poster
values.STYLE_FIDELITY_ANCHORS: readable feather silhouette made from transit and bicycle parts, sparse retro PSA layout, blue-green halftone object volume, navy and red type, warm cream negative space, tiny footer graphics
values.SOURCE_CONTENT_TO_AVOID: no plastic bottle construction, no caps pile, no dog or pet body, no pet-related copy, no exact source composition
